risks.risk: 发件人规则误判导致误伤其他邮件
risks.mitigation: exact sender + auth alignment + business fingerprint, double verification, mutation budget 1
single credential but hard endpoint guard, egress allowlist, no send/delete code path, security tests

risks.risk: 私有仓远端写入后公开 Evidence 失败
公开仓或日志泄漏敏感内容
risks.mitigation: redaction allowlist, secret/PII scan, no real fixtures, no model data path

risks.risk: age Recovery Key 丢失或泄漏
risks.mitigation: one-time delivery, protected secret, recovery drill, recipient versioning
risks.response: rotate for new data; assess historical exposure

risks.risk: PDF 密码未知导致结构化延迟
risks.mitigation: Raw/M3 independent, WAITING state, protected reprocess
weekly full reconcile, workflow_dispatch, stale public health evidence, simple Auto monitor
content addressing, no timeline history, no re-encrypt Raw, quota thresholds

risks.risk: Moomoo 邮件模板或发件人变化
risks.mitigation: verified unknown state, registry review, Raw-safe fallback, parser blue-green
risks.response: leave message untouched until deterministic update

risks.risk: 邮件内容 Prompt Injection 影响 Codex
risks.mitigation: no real content in model context, synthetic red-team fixtures only

risks.risk: Release Asset 替换失败导致无 Timeline
risks.mitigation: upload new verified temp asset before deleting old, final rename/replace semantics

risks.risk: 同一线程中的其他邮件被 Trash
risks.response: untrash if possible and kill M3
